---
title: "power_analysis_data_course"
author: "Peter Czingraber"
date: "2026-04-27"
output: html_document
---

#Libraries
```{r}
library(pwr)
```

## Data from previous studies

```{r}
CE_values = c (74, 58, 73, 52, 46, 25, 70, 39, 100, 89) # mean difference between incongruent and congruent trials in ms

mean_CE = mean(CE_values)
sd_CE = sd(CE_values)
```

## Effect size (Cohen's d)

```{r}
cohen_d = mean_CE / sd_CE
```

### Power analysis for the focal finding
```{r}
pwr.t.test(d = cohen_d, power = 0.80, sig.level = 0.05, type = "one.sample")
```
